file_insights.purpose: Package initialization for shared tests module

file_insights.changes: Created comprehensive test suite for multi-tenancy isolation
file_insights.purpose: Unit tests for TenantMiddleware, organization context resolution, and tenant isolation

patterns_discovered.description: Organization context resolved from user, header (X-Organization-ID), or cookie (emenum_org_id) with defined priority
Certain URL prefixes bypass tenant context requirement
Specific API endpoints require tenant context and return 403 if missing
Middleware injects organization context attributes into request object
403 responses follow consistent structure with error code TENANT_CONTEXT_REQUIRED

gotchas_discovered.description: Middleware maintains _organization_cache dictionary that could cause issues if not properly invalidated between requests
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests should verify cache behavior with multiple organizations

gotchas_discovered.description: Invalid UUIDs in headers/cookies silently result in None organization rather than explicit error
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could lead to unexpected behavior if invalid IDs are not properly handled upstream

gotchas_discovered.description: Tests create UserFactory with UserStatus.ACTIVE but middleware implementation details regarding inactive users are not tested
gotchas_discovered.potential_issue: No validation of user status before accepting their organization context

gotchas_discovered.description: When testing non-authenticated paths, request.user must be explicitly mocked with is_authenticated=False
gotchas_discovered.impact: Missing this mock could cause unexpected behavior in organization resolution logic

approach_outcome.summary: Created comprehensive test suite for multi-tenancy isolation covering 50+ test cases
coverage_areas: Tenant context injection and request attribute setup
approach_outcome.test_organization: Tests organized into 6 logical test classes with clear responsibility separation
approach_outcome.documentation: Comprehensive docstrings explaining test purpose and running instructions

recommendations.recommendation: Add tests for TenantContextMixin helper methods mentioned in docstring but not visible in provided diff
Add tests for utility functions get_current_organization() and set_current_organization() which are imported but not tested
Test organization with inactive status (OrganizationStatus other than ACTIVE)
Add tests for concurrent requests from multiple organizations to verify isolation
Add tests to verify middleware handles missing or malformed cookies gracefully
Create integration tests with actual Django middleware stack to verify interaction with other middleware
